_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: With 0 of 47 recent windows producing a ±2+ score move, HOLD is the statistically honest call — the coil persists until stablecoin growth revives or funding overheats.
next_move.brains_agree: Yes — both brains call HOLD/sideways with the market coiled, though they diverge on how bullish the setup is beneath the surface.
next_move.confirmed_if: stablecoin_growth breaks above 45 AND btc_momentum_30d pushes past 60 with funding cooling below 45
next_move.invalidated_if: funding spikes above 70 with btc_dom_fade accelerating past 60 while VIX drops below 50 — late-long leverage trap forming
